info.title: Fire-Viewer API
info.description: Transactional incident registry with idempotent ingestion, conservative spatial matching, immutable audit events and viewer manifests.

201.description: A new incident series was created.

get.description: Returns the public ViewerManifest in snake_case. A matching If-None-Match returns 304 without a body. This read endpoint never returns 409; conflicts are reserved for mutations.

ETag.description: Strong entity tag calculated from the serialized ViewerManifest.

Cache-Control.description: Short public cache lifetime for this viewer representation.

X-Trace-Id.description: Trace identifier to include when reporting an error.

304.description: Manifest unchanged; the response body is empty.

ETag.description: Strong entity tag calculated from the serialized ViewerManifest.

Cache-Control.description: Short public cache lifetime for this viewer representation.

X-Trace-Id.description: Trace identifier to include when reporting an error.

400.description: The fire_id path parameter has an invalid format.

X-Trace-Id.description: Trace identifier to include when reporting an error.

404.description: No incident exists for this fire_id.

X-Trace-Id.description: Trace identifier to include when reporting an error.
Trace identifier to include when reporting an error.

503.description: The incident data is temporarily unavailable.

X-Trace-Id.description: Trace identifier to include when reporting an error.

get.description: Private operational inventory keyed by the stable fire_id, never by zone_id.
Private review surface scoped to one permanent fire_id.
Private source and evidence-metadata surface; never streams raw media.
Private manifest, asset and job metadata for one incident dossier.
Current immutable scene plus private marker and active-zone overlay revisions.

post.description: Finalize an interrupted upload by rebuilding its bounded Blob inventory.

get.description: National internal map; each marker remains a stable incident-centred fire_id.

post.summary: Finalize Incident Spatial Package From Blob

AdminGlobalAuditEvent.title: AdminGlobalAuditEvent
AdminGlobalAuditEvent.description: Safe global audit projection: immutable metadata, never snapshots or payloads.

AdminIncidentCreateRequest.title: AdminIncidentCreateRequest
AdminIncidentCreateRequest.description: Minimal human input for a private incident created by an administrator.

AdminIncidentMediaReference.title: AdminIncidentMediaReference
AdminIncidentMediaReference.description: Evidence metadata only; media binaries and contributor identity stay private.

AdminIncidentObservationWorkspaceItem.title: AdminIncidentObservationWorkspaceItem
AdminIncidentObservationWorkspaceItem.description: Private observation projection used to resolve one incident dossier.

AdminOperationalMapModel.title: AdminOperationalMapModel
AdminOperationalMapModel.description: One controlled 3D representation available from an incident map panel.

AdminOperationalMapSignal.title: AdminOperationalMapSignal
AdminOperationalMapSignal.description: One persisted observation projected on the private anticipation map.

IncidentDiscoveryItem.title: IncidentDiscoveryItem
IncidentDiscoveryItem.description: Minimal public listing item used by search and recent-incident pages.

IncidentDiscoveryResponse.title: IncidentDiscoveryResponse
IncidentDiscoveryResponse.description: Bounded, text-only public discovery response; never a map index.
